title: Why Specialization Is Inevitable
summary: 文章探讨了在人工智能和机器学习领域，专业化分工的必然性，指出随着技术复杂度提升，通用模型将让位于针对特定任务优化的专业系统。
highlights: Specialization is not just a trend but an inevitable outcome of increasing complexity.
General-purpose models will be supplemented by specialized systems for specific domains.
The future of AI lies in tailored solutions rather than one-size-fits-all approaches.
